question: Under Article 8(1) of the Operating Law 2018, is a person permitted to operate or conduct business in or from the DIFC without being incorporated, registered, or continued under a Prescribed Law or other Legislation administered by the Registrar?

According to the title page of the Common Reporting Standard Law, what is its official DIFC Law number?
Do cases SCT 295/2025 and SCT 514/2025 involve any of the same legal entities or individuals as main parties?
What kind of liability do Partners have under Article 28(1) of the General Partnership Law 2004?
predicted_answer: Partners are jointly and severally liable for all debts and obligations of the General Partnership incurred while they are partners, unless all the other partners agree otherwise.
raw_response:
Answer: Partners are jointly and severally liable for all debts and obligations of the General Partnership incurred while they are partners, unless all the other partners agree otherwise.  
Indices: 1, 2

question: Under the Foundations Law DIFC Law No. 3 of 2018, what is the maximum fine for failing to provide a copy of an assignment of rights to the Registered Agent or Registrar within 30 days?

predicted_answer: The Board of Directors of the DIFCA appoints and may dismiss the Registrar (subject to consultation with the President).

Answer: The Board of Directors of the DIFCA appoints and may dismiss the Registrar (subject to consultation with the President).

question: Is there any main party common to both case CFI 057/2025 and case SCT 295/2025?
